annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest at Virginia’s judgment rate of 6% per annum — Va. Code §6.2-302 (with §8.01-382) fixes 6% for judgments that do not specify a rate. Simple interest. A judgment on a contract carries the higher of the lawful contract rate or 6%. Verify against the statute; not legal advice.
